name: WHITE FOX
description: Ami Han, the last of the legendary Kumiho, can summon her ancestral Nine-Tailed Power to fortify herself and heal her allies on the battlefield. As the calm and capable Director of Tiger Division, she is any team's unwavering backbone, no matter the foe.
lore: As the last in a long line of Kumiho, Ami Han was gifted with the mystical abilities of the legendary nine-tailed fox. She uses her powers as both the super hero codenamed White Fox and the Director of South Korea's superhuman intelligence agency, Tiger Division. While working to contain the Timestream Entanglement, White Fox attempted to collaborate with New York's Mayor, Wilson Fisk. But when Fisk started arresting heroes, including White Fox's ally Luna Snow, he crossed a line. Determined to stop Fisk, White Fox set her sights on New York.

abilities.name: YEOWOO GUSEUL
abilities.description: Fire a Fox Marble forward that bounces off terrain or heroes, then homes in on nearby heroes. It damages enemies, heals allies, and restores Spirit Tail energy

stats.Healing Amount: Direct hit: 50 per round; bounce hit: 35 per round
stats.Damage: Direct hit: 40 per round; bounce hit: 25 per round

abilities.name: CLAW STRIKE
abilities.description: While Awakened, slash forward with a flurry of attacks

abilities.name: SPECTRAL SURGE
abilities.description: Consume one Spirit Tail to send a spectral fox forward. It heals and grants invulnerability to allies it passes through, damages and Charms enemies, forcing foes to move toward White Fox

abilities.name: FOX FORM AWAKENING
abilities.description: Enter Awakened state, transforming Spirit Tails into physical tails. While active, continuously drain Spirit Tail energy and heal nearby allies. Striking enemies provides additional area healing

abilities.name: SPIRIT SANCTUARY
abilities.description: Teleport to a chosen ally, instantly healing allies in the area while generating a shield

stats.Special Effect: While the shield is active, it provides 20/s Healing Over Time to allies (including White Fox) within the shield's range

abilities.name: TAIL SWEEP
abilities.description: While Awakened, sweep forward tails to launch up hit enemies

abilities.name: Predatory Pounce
abilities.description: While Awakened, dash forward. Hit an enemy to slow them, enabling a second dash that knocks back enemies

abilities.name: KUMIHO UNLEASHED
abilities.description: Manifest the full Nine-Tailed Fox form and continuously heal nearby allies. Cannot receive healing effects from others while in this form

abilities.name: NINEFOLD SLAM
abilities.description: In Kumiho Form, slam the ground, causing an explosive shockwave. Hitting enemies or summons grants One-Time Healing to self and nearby allies

abilities.name: BLESSED BY THE NINE
abilities.description: In Kumiho Form, select an ally to grant Continuous Healing, Unstoppable, and Life-Steal for a short time

received.name: SPIRIT FOX WARD
received.description: White Fox grants Luna Snow a spirit fox for protection. Luna can activate it for a burst of speed and fire it forward, healing allies in its path while applying Charm to enemies

received.name: NINE-TAILED AURA
received.description: Black Cat shares her luck with her allies. When White Fox embraces her newfound fortune, she unleashestracking Spirit Tails to grant Healing and Speed to allies, while damaging and Slowing foes. When Captain America enjoys his luck, his shield's block radius expands and allows him to aim deflectedProjectiles directly toward his target

base.description: White Fox receives an Orb of Life from Black Cat. Upon use, it recovers Spirit Tail energy and converts life energy into Nine-Tailed Aura that shoots out in all directions. This automatically tracks nearby allies and enemies, granting Speed and Healing to allies while damaging and Slowing enemies. nhanced Effect: When teaming up with Black Cat, using the Orb triggers a state where Spirit Tail Energy is no longer consumed for a duration, allowing free use of Spectral Surge and Fox Form Awakening.
Activating Fox Form Awakening no longer consumes Spirit Tail energy, and grants the maximum possible duration immediately upon use.

enhanced.description: When teaming up with Psylocke, the cooldown for Fox Form Awakening is drastically reduced.
